Notice Of Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Attendance At An Independent Medical Examination With Dr. Kenneth Ishizue, M.D. On May 24, 2023 In San Jose
Off Calendar May-10-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Nia Gamble, Esq. 310-888-0024 Adamson Ahdoot LLP for Plaintiff.
Claudia Lozano, Esq. 510-457-3440 Stratman & Williams-Abrego for Defendant.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

ARGUED. Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT ZHILIN CONG's Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Attendance At An Independent Medical Examination With Dr. Kenneth Ishizue, M.D. On May 24, 2023 In San Jose.

Motion is denied, however parties stipulate to waive notice of Independent Medical Examination in Nevada.

Ms. Gamble to submit a proposed order in word format that is verbatim with the Court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312 directly to the Judge Pro Tem at Peter.Catalanotti@wilsonelser.com

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JPT)
